title: Adventurer's Beyond
description: Explore lost structures. fight dangerous bosses, and journey to the beyond in this epic mod.
body:
![Adventurer's Beyond banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fba7a9693fa60eeb98fa98a978a4d3205e27f5c8.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tE6ECVTZuDs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**📖 About:**
 

Adventure’s Beyond is a minecraft overhaul mod that mainly focuses on Exploring and Building, from updating the lush forests, to new End biomes, all the way to an entirely new shattered dimension! Be wary however because you're not alone in this world… Many new creatures now roam this world, and not all of them are peaceful. Illagers, Undead and Piglins alike seek to find the legendary power hidden in a failing dimension that was sealed away long ago, and with this power they won’t be your normal every day foes! Find huge dungeons, and fight dangerous bosses as you make your way into Mythica, the shattered dimension!

Credit: Thank you to: Luca_Plays_MC, Minecrafter10081, GrayJacksonrddb, & ArwenOC


![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9cbaa6540b4abe2b0865f6e6c217a7e8c4c4cf.png)
 

**🔎Overview:**
 
Notice: Adventurer’s Beyond is still early in development, many future updates are planned for the mod so stay tuned!

- Biome reworks/addons: From a wide range of flowers to the new Magnolia and Willow trees, the overworld and other dimensions will continue to be updated with more and more features to existing biomes.
- New Overworld Biomes: Mushroom Caverns & Amber Depths.
- New Nether Biomes: Ashed Wastes & Phoenix Forest.
- New End Biomes: Gloomy Barrens, Corrupted Heights, Orchestral Grove, & End Wilderness.
- Archeology Sites: Find all kinds of new sherds and minerals in the End & Overworld to create amazing pottery and weapons.
- New Mobs: A ton of new unique vanilla styled mobs to for you to find.
- Boss Arenas: Several bigger than normal structures can be found around the world that host bosses that you must defeat.
- The Gateway: In order to access Mythica you must find 4 jewels:
- One that is located in the Woodland Mansion; One that is held by the Drowned Conjurer; One that is fuel for the Rekindled; And one that is found on top the tallest tower of the Eternal City.
- A new dimension that's been shattered by an unknown event, dangerous creatures known as the Departed. Here you will find many strange ruins and perhaps even some special treasures.


![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9cbaa6540b4abe2b0865f6e6c217a7e8c4c4cf.png)

**💬Discord:**
 
Want to keep up with the latest Adventure’s Beyond updates, or are you just looking for a safe community? Then come join our discord! Here you can report bugs, suggest ideas, or just chat about the mod itself! We have a growing community here and we would be happy for you to join!
                                          

![border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9cbaa6540b4abe2b0865f6e6c217a7e8c4c4cf.png)


🗺️Roadmap:
 

Adventurer’s Beyond is nowhere near done! In fact it's still pretty early in development. Here’s a roadmap of what we wish to add:

.Note there is not set dates for any content so updates may be out of order

- Jungle & Forest Update: Red Pandas, Walnuts, Hibiscus, New Mushroom Types, Taller Trees, & More folia in general.
- Archeology Update: New Sniffer Plants, Relics, Vases, Statues.
- Mechanical Update: Netherite Smelteries, Gilding, Tempering, Nether Archeology, More features in custom Nether biomes.
- Deep Dark Update: Ancient City Overhaul, Ancient Archeology, ???
- And Much More!!
